FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.31sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f15281967a0>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-28T17:39:08Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-28T17:37:24Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-28T17:39:08Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-28T17:37:24Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/28 17:40:34.962953228 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/28 17:40:34.962961550 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/28 17:40:34.962992416 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/28 17:40:34.962993507 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress, timestamp, producer, author)
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963008069 {
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963008520 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963017102 new <- list()
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963017783 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963026596 new$width <- width
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963027087 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963036070 new$height <- height
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963036511 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963055479 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963056330 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963071803 new$title <- title
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963072654 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963088207 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963088978 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963102608 new$version <- version
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963103299 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963117340 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963118031 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963131641 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963132342 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963146433 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963147144 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963159993 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963160724 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963173763 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963174434 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963188766 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963189477 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963222285 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963223106 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963237988 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963238709 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963261012 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963261803 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963276765 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963277577 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963292288 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963292999 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963307090 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963307861 if (!missing(producer))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963322112 new$producer <- producer
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963322803 if (!missing(author))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963336463 new$author <- author
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963337174 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963354560 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963355662 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963372286 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963372957 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963388971 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963389802 "default"))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963405776 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963406457 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963420578 }
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963421349 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963435409 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963436080 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963450442 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963451233 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963466105 }
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963466766 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963479414 }
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963480115 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963492684 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963493485 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963507586 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963508257 domain = NA)
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963523109 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963523760 }
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963536879 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963537600 old$family <- family
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963552432 }
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963553103 version <- old$version
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963565141 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963565802 "2.0")
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963579111 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963579792 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963595576 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963596337 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963610648 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963611329 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963627453 domain = NA)
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963628204 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963643987 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963644668 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963663135 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963663866 old$fillOddEven, old$compress, old$timestamp, old$producer,
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963683746 old$author)
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963684417 invisible()
2026/05/28 17:40:34.963696695 }
